message:
fix(web): add proper loading states to DataLoadingOverlay

Implements phage_explorer-8mek - fixes the invisible empty state when
no progress data is available.

## Problem
Previously returned `<div />` when progress was null, making the
component invisible and providing no user feedback.

## Solution
- Add fallback displayProgress object when progress is null
- Show shimmer skeleton when percent is 0 (initialization phase)
- Show progress bar when actual progress is available
- Add slow load detection (15s timeout)
- Show warning message with retry option for slow loads

## Changes
- Import Skeleton component for animated loading indicator
- Add isSlowLoad state with 15s timeout detection
- Replace empty div with always-visible loading UI
- Add ARIA progressbar attributes for accessibility
- Add slow load warning with contextual message
- Screen reader announcements for all states

## User Experience
1. Initial load: Shows "Initializing..." with shimmer animation
2. Progress: Shows actual progress bar with smooth transition
3. Slow load: After 15s, shows warning + retry option
4. Always visible: Never returns invisible element
